name: cortado-marker

metadata.name: cortado-marker
metadata.summary: CORTADO: hill Climbing Optimization foR cell-Type specific mArker gene DiscOvery

documentation: # CORTADO: hill Climbing Optimization foR cell-Type specific mArker gene DiscOvery

functions.name: cortado_marker.utils.sigmoid
documentation:
Sigmoid function.

Parameters:
- x (float): Input value

Returns:
- float: Sigmoid output

functions.name: cortado_marker.utils.create_binary_vector
documentation:
Create a binary vector with a specified number of 1s.

Parameters:
- length (int): Length of the binary vector
- num_ones (int): Number of 1s in the binary vector

Returns:
- np.array: Binary vector

functions.name: cortado_marker.utils.get_neighbor
documentation:
Get a neighbor of a given binary vector.

Parameters:
- solution (np.array): Binary vector
- mode (int): Mode for generating neighbor

Returns:
- np.array: Neighbor binary vector

functions.name: cortado_marker.evaluate.evaluate
documentation:
Evaluate gene selection against true markers.

Parameters:
- best_solution (np.array): Best binary vector
- scores_df (pd.DataFrame): Marker gene scores
- true_markers_file (str): Path to true marker genes CSV file
- marker_column (str): Column name in true marker CSV for markers
- plot_filepath (str): Path to save evaluation plot
- csv_filepath (str): Path to save evaluation results CSV
- plot_title (str): Title for the evaluation plot

Returns:
- precision (float): Precision
- recall (float): Recall
- f1 (float): F1 score
- accuracy (float): Accuracy

functions.name: cortado_marker.data.load_data
documentation:
Load gene expression data and metadata.

Parameters:
- exp_path (str): Path to gene expression CSV file
- metadata_path (str): Path to metadata CSV file
- metadata_label_column (str): Column in metadata that contains cell labels
- tenX (bool): If True, indicates the data is in 10X format
- preprocess (bool): If True, preprocess the gene expression data

Returns:
- adata (AnnData): Loaded gene expression data

modules.name: cortado_marker
documentation:
Cortado package
================

A brief description of the package.

functions.name: cortado_marker.marker_genes.calc_marker_gene_score
documentation:
Calculate marker gene scores for a given cluster.

Parameters:
- adata (AnnData): Gene expression data
- target_cluster (str): Target cluster label
- n_genes (int): Number of top marker genes to select
- pval_threshold (float): P-value threshold for marker genes
- use_raw (bool): If True, use raw data for marker gene selection

Returns:
- marker_scores (pd.DataFrame): Marker gene scores

functions.name: cortado_marker.marker_genes.gene_correlation_within_cluster
documentation:
Calculate gene correlation within a given cluster.

Parameters:
- target_cluster (str): Target cluster label
- adata (AnnData): Gene expression data

Returns:
- sim_scores (pd.DataFrame): Gene correlation scores

functions.name: cortado_marker.hill_climbing.obj
documentation:
Objective function for stochastic hill climbing.

Parameters:
- X (np.array): Binary vector
- nGenes (int): Number of genes
- lambda1 (float): Weight for marker gene score
- lambda2 (float): Weight for similarity score
- lambda3 (float): Weight for gene set size
- marker_scores (pd.DataFrame): Marker gene scores
- sim_scores (pd.DataFrame): Gene correlation scores

Returns:
- float: Objective function value

functions.name: cortado_marker.hill_climbing.stochastic_hill_climbing_adaptive
documentation:
Stochastic hill climbing algorithm with adaptive exploration reduction.

Parameters:
- f (function): Objective function
- initial_solution (np.array): Initial binary vector
- max_iterations (int): Maximum number of iterations
- gamma (float): Exploration rate
- idle_limit (int): Idle limit before stopping
- how_many_neighbors (int): Number of neighbors to consider
- nGenes (int): Number of genes
- lambda1 (float): Weight for marker gene score
- lambda2 (float): Weight for similarity score
- lambda3 (float): Weight for gene set size
- marker_scores (pd.DataFrame): Marker gene scores
- sim_scores (pd.DataFrame): Gene correlation scores
- mode (int): Mode for generating initial solution

Returns:
- best_solution (np.array): Best binary vector
- best_value (float): Best objective function value

functions.name: cortado_marker.hill_climbing.run_stochastic_hill_climbing
documentation:
Run stochastic hill climbing algorithm.

Parameters:
- marker_scores (pd.DataFrame): Marker gene scores
- filtered_corr_matrix (pd.DataFrame): Filtered gene correlation scores
- how_many (int): Number of 1s in the binary vector
- max_iterations (int): Maximum number of iterations
- gamma (float): Exploration rate
- idle_limit (int): Idle limit before stopping
- lambda1 (float): Weight for marker gene score
- lambda2 (float): Weight for similarity score
- lambda3 (float): Weight for gene set size
- mode (int): Mode for generating initial solution
- plot_filename (str): Filename for the cost plot

Returns:
- best_solution (np.array): Best binary vector
- best_value (float): Best objective function value
